title: Client Services Specialist (1-Year Contract)
description:
Job Purpose

The Client Services Specialist role supports the Head of Client Services as well as the frontline Wealth Advisors in
the following activities:

1. Attending to client and prospect inquiries about the branch’s WM proposition and processes
2. Providing assistance to the Account Opening/ CDD teams in Singapore and Dubai as well as frontline
Relationship Managers and Wealth Advisors seeking to streamline the onboarding experience for clients. This
includes helping with

  • Name Screening & Source of Wealth corroboration
  • Periodic CDD reviews and updates

3. Providing assistance to Wealth Advisors on a day-to-day basis with client inquiries, updation of client KYC
documentation, sharing of documentation between teams in Dubai and Singapore, etc.
4. Managing administrative tasks on behalf of the Wealth Advisors including systems access, control assessment
testing, client facing stationery, etc.
5. Assisting Wealth Advisors with taking client orders for new Investments & Lending transactions, managing the
suitability and other pre-sale risk & compliance checks, post trade updates to clients and other stakeholders in
Dubai
6. Monitoring clients’ deposit and loan maturities, roll overs, repayments, etc.
7. Assisting Wealth Advisors to prepare for Portfolio reviews with clients
8. Assisting in the management of various regulatory & control aspects of the WM business e.g. Vulnerabilty
assessments, client instructions, credit review documentation, etc.
9. Collaborating with other departments in the SG branch and the Head office in order to farther achievement of
branch goals whilst promoting SG WM goals

Requirements:-

  • Min a Diploma/Bachelor’s degree. Diploma in Wealth Management is desirable.
  • At least 5-7 years in the private bank or wealth management unit.
  • Certification in CACS Paper 1 & 2.
  • Well versed with the regulatory regime (local & global).
  • Self Motivated individual, proactiveness, strong team player, and able to meet tight deadlines and multi-task.
  • Meticulous with a strong attention to detail
  • Able to start work immediately

*Note that salary commensurate with relevant years of experience.

postedCompany.description:
Emirates NBD is a leading Banking Group in the MENAT (Middle East, North Africa & Turkey) region, headquartered in Dubai and listed on the Dubai Financial Market. The Bank is ranked 85th globally in The Banker’s list of the World’s Top 1,000 Banks for 2023. In addition, Emirates NBD has been assessed as the ‘Strongest Bank in the UAE’ and ‘Fifth Strongest Bank in the Middle East’ by The Asian Banker 500 Largest and Strongest Banks Rankings. Emirates NBD Bank has operations in the UAE, Egypt, Turkey, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, India, Singapore, the United Kingdom, Austria, Germany, Russia and Bahrain and representative offices in China and Indonesia with a total of 853 branches servicing over 20million customers with its presence across 13 countries. As a significant retail banking franchise in the UAE, Emirates NBD is also a major player in the UAE corporate segment with strong Islamic banking, investment banking, private banking, asset management, global markets & treasury and brokerage operations. Currently, more than 30,000 people, representing more than 90 nationalities, are employed by Emirates NBD, making it one of the largest and most culturally diversified employers in the UAE.


Emirates NBD Bank Singapore Branch was established in July 2010 and operates as Emirates NBD's hub for East Asia. In Singapore, the Bank offers working capital, trade finance, commercial loans, treasury, deposits (Conventional and Islamic) to our Corporate and Institutional clients, and wealth management services to high net worth clients.
postedCompany.name: EMIRATES NBD BANK (P.J.S.C)

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
